blurb: The Apple MDM protocol operates over HTTPS with TLS mutual authentication, using Apple Push Notification service to wake devices and trigger check-ins with the MDM server – no confidential data traverses APNs itself. Configuration profiles are XML or JSON structures encrypted using CMS with AES-128. Managed Device Attestation uses the Secure Enclave and ACME protocol to generate hardware-bound ECDSA keys (P-256 or P-384) that cryptographically attest device identity, OS version, and security posture to MDM servers, verified against the Apple Enterprise Attestation Root CA. This prevents compromised or impersonating devices from falsely representing their configuration or enrollment status.
